description: Style NoteMixing classic natural prints with a hint of the exotic (nailing the latest summer trend) colour block this top from Tonga with for an effortlessly breezy vibe. For winter, you can smarten this up by layering it with a pastel toned cardi or a colour pop blazer. Product DetailsBlack lace top with a sleeveless beige inner, short sleeves and an elasticated hemMaterial and Care100% nylonHandwashDo not bleachDry on a flat surfaceSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
